data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplifies decision-making by limiting choices presented to users for quicker interactions.
data.technical_spec: User navigation and decision points are streamlined to require minimal effort.

data.title: Fitts' Law
data.description: Designs elements that are easy to target and interact with, using prominent buttons and links.
data.technical_spec: Interactive elements have adequate size and are positioned within user's reach.

data.title: Law of Prägnanz
data.description: Uses simplicity and clarity to present content in a way that users can easily perceive and process.
data.technical_spec: Apple focuses on clean layouts with ample white space.

data.title: Von Restorff Effect
data.description: Features unique elements that capture user interest and ensure high recall.
data.technical_spec: Key products or promotions are highlighted visually.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Cognition is aided by limiting content chunks to enhance memory and information processing.
data.technical_spec: Information is grouped into chunks of 7 ± 2 items.
